chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 1021 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.6065/2025 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at Flag-A 3. For orders on MA No.6066/2025 (Ex./A) 4. For hearing of bail application 22.10.2025 Mr. Abdul Ghani Maitlo, Advocate along with applicant / accused..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is allowed. 3. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 2 & 4. As to the query made in terms of the office objection that statement is to be filed to clarify whether the present applicant, prior to this application, had applied or not for the same relief, learned Counsel states that the applicant was earlier approached the learned trial Court for pre-arrest bail, wherein his application bearing Cr. Pre-Arrest B.A No.283/2024 was disposed of by order dated 28.03.2024, whereby her earlier granted interim bail vide order dated 24.01.2024 was confirmed on the same terms and conditions, and she was directed to attend the trial regularly. Learned Counsel further contends that the applicant due to murder of her husband was unable to attend the learned trial Court, wherein on 10.04.2025, NBW was issued against her. Thereafter, she was declared absconder on 03.10.2025 and proceedings under Section 87, Cr.P.C. were initiated against her. As the applicant is already on bail, which has not yet been recalled as per the available record, this criminal bail application is converted into a criminal miscellaneous application and is accordingly disposed of by suspending the NBW issued against the applicant and proceedings under Section 87, Cr.P.C. initiated against her.

Thereafter, she was declared absconder on 03.10.2025 and proceedings under Section 87, Cr.P.C. were initiated against her. As the applicant is already on bail, which has not yet been recalled as per the available record, this criminal bail application is converted into a criminal miscellaneous application and is accordingly disposed of by suspending the NBW issued against the applicant and proceedings under Section 87, Cr.P.C. initiated against her. The applicant is directed to appear before the learned trial Court and participate in the trial. Office to assign proper number to the Court’s file. Matter stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
